message:
Fix wasm_abi test: use Display format for RegionId/TaskId assertions

The cancellation_payload_maps_core_reason_fields test asserted Debug
format strings ("RegionId(3:7)", "TaskId(4:1)") but from_reason() uses
.to_string() which invokes Display ("R3", "T4"). This was a pre-existing
test failure blocking CI for multiple agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
